orderHistory.description: Page heading / title for the order history list page.

loading.description: Generic loading indicator text shown while the order list or order detail is being fetched.

loadMore.description: Button at the bottom of the order list that fetches more orders.

showingCount.description: Pagination summary above the order list. {shown} = number of orders currently displayed; {total} = total order count (ICU plural selects 'order'/'orders').

emptyTitle.description: Title of the empty state shown when the user has no orders.

emptyDescription.description: Body text of the empty state shown when the user has no orders yet.

emptyPbnDescription.description: Empty state shown when filtering by a parent domain returns no orders. {domain} = the parent domain name — keep untranslated. Keep the quoted "Show all parents" label matching the toggle wording.

list.domainName.description: Column header for the domain name in the order list table view.

list.createdAt.description: Column header for the order creation date in the order list table view.

list.status.description: Column header for the order status in the order list table view.

list.nftWallet.description: Column header for the NFT receiving wallet in the order list table view.

list.created.description: Inline label preceding an order's creation date in the order list. Ends with a colon.

list.viewDetails.description: Link/button in an order list row that opens the order detail page.

card.orderNumber.description: Heading on an order card showing the order's sequential number. {rowNum} = the order's display number — keep untranslated.

card.itemsHeading.description: Items section heading on an order card. {visible} = number of items shown — keep untranslated.

card.itemsHeadingOfTotal.description: Items section heading on an order card when some items are hidden. {visible} = items shown, {total} = total items — keep both untranslated.

card.totalLabel.description: Inline label preceding the order's total amount on an order card. Ends with a colon.

card.noItemsMatch.description: Message on an order card when the active filter/view hides all of its items.

card.showMore.description: Toggle on an order card to reveal hidden items. {count} = number of additional items (ICU plural selects 'item'/'items').

card.showLess.description: Toggle on an order card to collapse the expanded item list.

card.showFromOtherParents.description: Toggle on an order card to reveal items belonging to other parent domains. {count} = number of such items (ICU plural).

card.hideFromOtherParents.description: Toggle on an order card to hide items belonging to other parent domains. {count} = number of such items (ICU plural).

card.durationYears.description: Compact duration badge on an order item showing registration length in years. {count} = number of years (ICU plural selects 'yr'/'yrs'); keep abbreviated.

toolbar.filters.description: Order list toolbar button that opens the filters panel.

toolbar.sort.description: Order list toolbar button showing the current sort. {label} = the active sort option name.

toolbar.sortBy.description: Label/heading for the sort-field selector in the order list toolbar.

toolbar.direction.description: Label/heading for the sort-direction selector in the order list toolbar.

toolbar.sortDate.description: Sort-field option: sort orders by date.

toolbar.sortPrice.description: Sort-field option: sort orders by price.

toolbar.sortDirAsc.description: Compact ascending-direction label shown in the sort summary.

toolbar.sortDirDesc.description: Compact descending-direction label shown in the sort summary.

toolbar.reset.description: Button that clears all order list filters and sort settings back to defaults.

toolbar.onlyCurrentPbn.description: Filter toggle label limiting the order list to one parent domain. {domain} = the parent domain name wrapped in a <code> tag — keep the domain and tag untranslated.

toolbar.filterDomainName.description: Filter field label: filter orders by domain name.

toolbar.filterOrderId.description: Filter field label: filter orders by order ID.

toolbar.filterNftReceivingWallet.description: Filter field label: filter orders by NFT receiving wallet address.

toolbar.filterNftReceivingChainId.description: Filter field label: filter orders by NFT receiving chain ID. 'chain id' is a blockchain identifier.

toolbar.filterOrderStatus.description: Filter field label: filter orders by order status.

itemType.register.description: Order item type badge: a new domain registration.

itemType.import.description: Order item type badge: importing an existing domain.

itemType.renew.description: Order item type badge: renewing a domain.

unlinkedWalletTooltip.description: Tooltip explaining that the NFT receiving wallet is not linked to the current account, so the domain won't appear in the account.

nftWalletLabel.description: Field label for the NFT receiving wallet in the mobile order list row. 'NFT' is a technical term — keep it.

viewTransactionTitle.description: Tooltip/title for the link that opens an x402 payment's blockchain transaction in a block explorer.

walletNotLinked.description: Short inline notice that the displayed wallet isn't linked to the user's account.

timeline.subtitle.description: Subtitle under the order progress timeline indicating it shows live updates.

timeline.orderDetails.label.description: Progress timeline step label: order is being prepared/validated.

timeline.orderDetails.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the order-preparation stage (validating domains and wallet config).

timeline.payments.label.description: Progress timeline step label: collecting/confirming payment.

timeline.payments.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the payment stage, noting blockchain confirmations may take 30+ seconds.

timeline.items.label.description: Progress timeline step label: registering domains.

timeline.items.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the domain registration stage (securing each domain on the blockchain).

timeline.items.renewLabel.description: Progress timeline step label for the items stage when the order is renewals only (renewing domains).

timeline.items.renewHelper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the items stage of a renewals-only order (extending each registration on-chain).

timeline.items.importLabel.description: Progress timeline step label for the items stage when the order is imports only (importing domains).

timeline.items.importHelper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the items stage of an imports-only order (submitting import requests to the registrars).

timeline.postProcessing.label.description: Progress timeline step label: final post-processing touches.

timeline.postProcessing.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the post-processing stage. 'Namefi' is the brand name — keep untranslated.

timeline.finalStatus.label.description: Progress timeline step label: finalizing the overall order status.

timeline.finalStatus.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for applying the final status to the order.

timeline.refund.label.description: Progress timeline step label: handling refunds for unfulfilled items.

timeline.refund.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for the refund stage (returning funds for items that could not be secured).

timeline.notification.label.description: Progress timeline step label: sending the confirmation/receipt email.

timeline.notification.helper.description: Progress timeline step helper text for preparing the receipt and order summary email.

detail.authRequired.description: Message on the order detail page prompting the user to sign in to view order details.

detail.unauthorized.description: Message shown on the order detail page when the signed-in user is not authorized to view this order.

detail.congratulations.description: Celebratory heading on a successfully completed order's detail page.

detail.renewedTitle.description: Heading on a successfully completed renewals-only order's detail page (the renewal is done).

detail.couldNotComplete.description: Heading on the order detail page when the order failed to complete.

detail.successSubheading.description: Subheading on a successful order confirming the domain(s) and NFT(s) were delivered. {count} = number of domains (ICU plural switches 'domain'/'domains' and 'is the NFT'/'are the NFTs').

detail.mintingSubheading.description: Subheading on a successful registration order whose NFT(s) are still being minted on-chain. {count} = number of domains (ICU plural). 'NFT' is a technical term — keep untranslated.

detail.renewedSubheading.description: Subheading on a successful renewals-only order confirming the registration period was extended. {count} = number of domains (ICU plural switches the possessive 'domain's registration has'/'domains' registrations have').

detail.importSubmittedSubheading.description: Subheading on a successful imports-only order: the import request was submitted and the previous registrar will confirm within 5-7 days. {count} = number of domains (ICU plural).

detail.failedSubheading.description: Subheading on the order detail page when processing failed, inviting the user to review details below.

detail.nftWallet.description: Label for the NFT receiving wallet on the order detail page.

detail.viewFullDetails.description: Button/link on the order detail page opening the full order details.

detail.backToHome.description: Button/link on the order detail page returning the user to the home page.

detail.shareDialogTitle.description: Title of the dialog for sharing domain access with a recipient.

detail.shareDialogDescription.description: Description in the share-access dialog explaining to send the message to the recipient.

detail.message.description: Label for the editable share message field in the share-access dialog.

detail.shareManageDefault.description: Default share message text inviting the recipient to manage their domain. 'Namefi' is the brand name — keep untranslated.

detail.shareManageMessage.description: Share message template sent to a recipient. {domains} = list of domain names — keep untranslated; {count} = number of domains (ICU plural switches 'your domain'/'your domains'). 'Namefi' is the brand name — keep untranslated.

detail.shareManageMessageRenew.description: Share message template sent to a recipient for a renewals-only order (renewed rather than registered). {domains} = list of domain names — keep untranslated; {count} = number of domains (ICU plural switches 'your domain'/'your domains'). 'Namefi' is the brand name — keep untranslated.

processing.processingYourOrder.description: Heading shown on the order processing/progress screen while the order is in progress.

processing.processingDomains.description: Processing status line. {count} = number of domains being processed (ICU plural).

processing.importing.description: Processing status line for imports. {count} = number of domains importing (ICU plural). Keep the lowercase 'importing' wording consistent with sibling strings.

processing.registering.description: Processing status line for registrations. {count} = number of domains registering (ICU plural). Keep lowercase 'registering'.

processing.renewing.description: Processing status line for renewals. {count} = number of domains renewing (ICU plural). Keep lowercase 'renewing'.

processing.joinTwo.description: Grammar helper to join exactly two domain names in a sentence. {first} and {last} are domain names — keep untranslated; translate only the connecting word.

processing.joinMany.description: Grammar helper to join three or more domain names in a sentence. {first}, {middle}, {last} are domain name fragments — keep untranslated; translate only the connecting punctuation/word.

processing.descItemsImportOnly.description: Processing description when the order contains only imports, explaining the 5-7 day timeline and registrar/unlock caveats.

processing.descItemsImportAndRegister.description: Processing description when the order mixes registrations and imports, explaining the 5-7 day import timeline and unlock caveats.

processing.descItemsDefault.description: Default processing description for the items stage (each domain is being submitted to the registrar).

processing.descItemsRenewOnly.description: Processing description for the items stage of a renewals-only order (extending each domain's registration on-chain). {count} = number of domains (ICU plural).

processing.descPostProcessingImport.description: Processing description for the post-processing stage of an import (the old registrar will contact the user; typically 5-7 days).

processing.descPostProcessingDefault.description: Default processing description for the post-processing stage (refreshing indexes and preparing on-chain records).

processing.descPostProcessingRenew.description: Processing description for the post-processing stage of a renewals-only order (finalizing the new expiration on-chain).

processing.descImportOnly.description: Top-level processing description when the order is import-only (initiating import; typically 5-7 days).

processing.descImportAndRegister.description: Top-level processing description when the order mixes registrations and imports (imports typically 5-7 days).

processing.descRenewOnly.description: Top-level processing description when the order is renewals-only (extending the registration period). {count} = number of domains (ICU plural).

processing.descDefault.description: Generic fallback processing description while the order is wrapping up.

notFound.description.description: Body text of the order-not-found page, asking the user to check the order ID and retry.

notFound.backToOrders.description: Button on the order-not-found page returning the user to the orders list.

share.shareOn.description: Label preceding social share targets, e.g. 'Share on [X]'.

summary.orderDetails.description: Title of the order summary card shown on the order detail page.

summary.date.description: Label for the order date row in the order summary card.

summary.grandTotal.description: Label for the grand total row in the order summary card.

summary.paymentsSingle.description: Section label in the order summary when the order has a single payment.

summary.paymentsMultiple.description: Section label in the order summary when the order has multiple payments.

aiGenerations.title.description: Title of the AI logo preview section on the order detail page. 'Just AIng by Namefi™' is a trademarked product name — keep verbatim, do not translate.

aiGenerations.description.description: Description of the AI logo preview section, inviting the user to explore more styles. 'Just AIng' is a trademarked product name — keep untranslated.

aiGenerations.noPreview.description: Placeholder shown when no AI logo preview was generated for a domain.

aiGenerations.previewUnavailable.description: Placeholder shown when an AI logo preview failed to load / is unavailable.

aiGenerations.logoAlt.description: Alt text for a generated logo image. {domain} = the domain name — keep untranslated.

details.heading.description: Heading of the order details section/page.

details.orderItems.description: Sub-heading for the list of order items on the order details page.

details.payments.description: Sub-heading for the payments list on the order details page.

details.unauthorized.description: Message shown when the user is not authorized to view this order's details.

details.actionRequiredTitle.description: Title of the action-required banner on the order details page.

details.actionRequiredAll.description: Action-required banner text when every item in the order needs user action.

details.actionRequiredSingle.description: Action-required banner text when one specific item needs user action. {domain} = the domain name wrapped in a <highlight> tag — keep the domain and tag untranslated.

details.actionRequiredSome.description: Action-required banner text when some items need user action. {count} = items needing action, {total} = total items — keep both untranslated.

details.actionRequiredDialogTitle.description: Title of the action-required dialog on the order details page.

details.actionRequiredDialogDescription.description: Description in the action-required dialog asking the user to review and take necessary actions.

details.viewOrderDetails.description: Button/link that opens the order details view.

details.viewTechnicalDetails.description: Button/link that opens the technical (raw) order details dialog.

details.status.description: Field label for the order status on the order details page.

details.placedAt.description: Field label for when the order was placed on the order details page.

details.nftWallet.description: Field label for the NFT receiving wallet on the order details page.

details.walletNotLinked.description: Inline notice that the NFT receiving wallet isn't linked to the user's account.

details.walletAddressCopied.description: Toast confirming the wallet address was copied to the clipboard.

details.copyWalletAddress.description: Accessibility/tooltip label for the copy-wallet-address button.

details.copyWalletAddressTooltip.description: Tooltip text for the copy-wallet-address button.

details.copied.description: Short confirmation shown after copying a value to the clipboard.

details.amount.description: Field label for a payment amount on the order details page.

details.mintedNft.description: Field label for a minted NFT on an order item.

details.nft.description: Short label for an NFT. 'NFT' is a technical term — keep it.

details.minting.description: Inline status shown while an NFT is being minted.

details.renewalTx.description: Field label for the renewal transaction. 'tx' = blockchain transaction — keep abbreviated.

details.updatingExpiration.description: Inline status shown while a domain's expiration date is being updated.

details.total.description: Field label for the total amount on the order details page.

details.noPayments.description: Message shown when an order has no payments yet.

details.techDialogTitle.description: Title of the technical order details dialog.

details.techDialogDescription.description: Description in the technical order details dialog explaining each field can be copied via the copy icon.

details.orderId.description: Field label for the order ID in the technical details dialog.

details.totalAmount.description: Field label for the total amount in the technical details dialog.

details.network.description: Field label for the blockchain network in the technical details dialog.

details.paymentsCount.description: Field label for the number of payments in the technical details dialog ('#' = count).

details.itemsCount.description: Field label for the number of items in the technical details dialog ('#' = count).

details.mintedNfts.description: Field label for the list of minted NFTs in the technical details dialog.

details.copyExplorerUrl.description: Tooltip/label for the button that copies a blockchain explorer URL.

details.chainIdLabel.description: Label showing a blockchain chain ID. {chainId} = the numeric chain ID — keep untranslated.

details.paymentLabel.description: Label for a payment entry in the payments list. {index} = the payment's sequence number — keep untranslated.

details.payment.description: Generic 'Payment' label/heading in the payment details view.

details.method.description: Field label for the payment method.

details.charged.description: Payment status: the amount was charged.

details.refundPending.description: Payment status: a refund is pending.

details.card.description: Short label for a card payment method.

details.wallet.description: Short label for a wallet payment method.

details.paymentDetailsTitle.description: Title of the payment details dialog.

details.paymentId.description: Field label for the payment ID in the payment details dialog. The value is an identifier — keep untranslated.

details.type.description: Field label for the payment type in the payment details dialog.

details.typeX402.description: Payment type value: x402 (USDC). 'x402' and 'USDC' are technical names — keep untranslated.

details.typeOnChain.description: Payment type value: on-chain (NFSC). 'NFSC' is a technical token name — keep untranslated.

details.buyerWallet.description: Field label for the buyer's wallet address in the payment details dialog.

details.receiverWallet.description: Field label for the receiver's wallet address in the payment details dialog.

details.settlementTx.description: Field label for the settlement transaction. 'Tx' = blockchain transaction — keep abbreviated.

details.txHash.description: Field label for a transaction hash. 'Tx Hash' is a technical term — keep it; the value is a hash — keep untranslated.

details.brand.description: Field label for the card brand (e.g. Visa, Mastercard) in the payment details dialog.

details.last4.description: Field label for the last 4 digits of a payment card.

details.refunds.description: Section heading for refunds in the payment details dialog.

details.loadingRefunds.description: Inline status shown while refund records are being loaded.

details.noRefunds.description: Message shown when a payment has no refunds.

details.refundLabel.description: Label for a refund entry in the refunds list. {index} = the refund's sequence number — keep untranslated.

details.refundTxHash.description: Field label for a refund transaction hash. The value is a hash — keep untranslated.

details.itemDetailsTitle.description: Title of the order item details dialog.

details.domain.description: Field label for the domain name on an order item. The value is a domain name — keep untranslated.

details.duration.description: Registration duration value on an order item. {count} = number of years (ICU plural selects 'year'/'years').

details.durationLabel.description: Field label for the registration duration on an order item.

details.requiredAction.description: Field label/heading for a required action on an order item.

details.domainUnlockRequiredTitle.description: Title of the required-action prompt when a domain must be unlocked at the registrar.

details.domainUnlockRequiredDescription.description: Instructions for the domain-unlock required action (unlock at the registrar, then confirm here).

details.confirming.description: Inline status shown while the unlock confirmation is being submitted.

details.iUnlockedDomain.description: Button the user clicks to confirm they unlocked the domain at their registrar.

details.authCodeRequiredTitle.description: Title of the required-action prompt when a new auth code is needed for an import.

details.authCodeRequiredDescription.description: Instructions for the auth-code required action (enter the new auth code from your registrar to continue the import).

details.authCode.description: Field label for the domain transfer auth code input. 'Auth code' is a technical term — keep it.

details.authCodePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text inside the auth code input field.

details.updating.description: Inline status shown while the auth code is being updated.

details.updateAuthCode.description: Button that submits the updated auth code.

details.cancelThisItem.description: Title/label for the cancel-item required action.

details.cancelThisItemDescription.description: Explanation that canceling will stop processing this order item if the user no longer wants to proceed.

details.canceling.description: Inline status shown while an order item is being canceled.

details.cancelItem.description: Button that cancels the order item.

details.loading.description: Generic loading indicator within the order item / payment details views.

details.requiredActionAuthCode.description: Short required-action summary: a new auth code is needed to continue the import.

details.requiredActionUnlock.description: Short required-action summary: confirm the domain is unlocked at the current registrar.

details.toastAuthCodeUpdated.description: Toast confirming the auth code was updated and the import is resuming.

details.toastAuthCodeFailed.description: Toast shown when updating the auth code failed.

details.toastUnlockConfirmed.description: Toast confirming the unlock was acknowledged and the request is resuming.

details.toastUnlockFailed.description: Toast shown when confirming the unlock failed.

details.toastItemCancelled.description: Toast confirming the order item was cancelled and the request is stopping.

details.toastCancelFailed.description: Toast shown when canceling the order item failed.

details.toastEnterAuthCode.description: Validation toast prompting the user to enter the auth code before continuing.

details.failureTimeoutAuthCodeDuration.description: Failure reason: the auth code wasn't updated in time, so the item was canceled. {duration} = the elapsed lock/timeout period (a formatted duration).

details.failureTimeoutLockedDuration.description: Failure reason: the domain stayed locked too long, so the item was canceled. {duration} = the elapsed locked period (a formatted duration).

details.failureTimeoutAuthCode.description: Failure reason: the auth code update timed out, so the order item was canceled.

details.failureTimeoutLocked.description: Failure reason: the domain stayed locked too long, so the order item was canceled.

details.failureAdminAuthCode.description: Failure reason: an auth code update was required and support canceled the request.

details.failureAdminLocked.description: Failure reason: the domain was locked and support canceled the request.

details.failureUserAuthCode.description: Failure reason: an auth code update was required and the user canceled the request.

details.failureUserLocked.description: Failure reason: the domain was locked and the user canceled the request.
